name: AURON ONE20
comment: AURON ONE20 defines the class of compact moving lights new. With its powerful 120W RGBL High Power LED Engine and additional 24 RGB AURON FX LEDs, it delivers brilliant colors, homogeneous surfaces and spectacular effects possibilities. Whether as a beam, wash or creative FX tool – the AURON ONE20 is a true all-rounder for stage, club or event. Particularly impressive is the extremely flexible zoom range from 4deg to 45deg: From a sharply focused, assertive strong beam to a soft, wide-area wash – This moving head covers every requirement with ease. This allows you to create powerful mid-air effects as well as create atmospheric surface looks. The RGBL LED engine (red, green, blue, lime) provides an exceptional typically high light quality with rich, vibrant colors and precise White display. Together with the different dimming curves, the high-speed strobe (up to 30Hz) and the AURON FX lighting. The AURON ONE20 opens up limitless creative possibilities. With only 8.3 kg weight, compact housing and professional Features such as motorized pan/tilt (540°/220°), DMX-512 (5- and 3-pin), RDM, sound & auto mode and temperature-controlled ventilation is The AURON ONE20 is not only a powerful but also a reliable tool for the tough everyday rental and touring use. Whether for lighting designers, rental companies or event productions – the LCPRO AURON ONE20 combines power, flexibility and compact design in one device and sets new standards for creative lighting design.

capabilities.comment: Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
Inverse Square Law Dimmer Curve - Custom
Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
Pulse Strobe S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
